sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_time DateTime, timezone String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, now(), 'UTC'), (2, now(), 'Asia/Istanbul');
SELECT id, event_time, timezone FROM test_dates WHERE event_time GLOBAL IN (SELECT now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY);
SELECT id, event_time, timezone FROM test_dates WHERE timezone = (SELECT timezone FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1);
SELECT id, event_time, timezone, now() AS current_time FROM test_dates WHERE event_time = (SELECT max(event_time) FROM test_dates WHERE timezone = 'UTC');
SELECT id, event_time, timezone FROM test_dates GROUP BY timezone HAVING count(*) > (SELECT count(*) FROM test_dates WHERE timezone = 'Asia/Istanbul') + 1;
CREATE TABLE temp_test (id UInt32, value String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, value, now() AS current_time FROM temp_test WHERE value GLOBAL IN (SELECT toString(event_time) FROM test_dates);
SELECT id, event_time, timezone FROM test_dates WHERE event_time > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND timezone GLOBAL IN (SELECT timezone FROM temp_test WHERE id = 1);
SELECT id, count(*) as count_events FROM test_dates GROUP BY timezone HAVING count_events > (SELECT count(*) FROM test_dates WHERE event_time < now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY);
